wandbHeader.value: Experiment Tracking

enableWandb.label: Enable Weights & Biases (wandb)
enableWandb.name: enable_wandb
enableWandb.help: Track experiments, visualize metrics, and compare runs using Weights & Biases. Requires a wandb account (free at wandb.ai).

wandbApiKey.label: Wandb API Key
wandbApiKey.name: wandb_api_key
wandbApiKey.help: Your Weights & Biases API key. Find it at wandb.ai/authorize. For security, you can also set the WANDB_API_KEY environment variable and leave this blank.
wandbApiKey.placeholder: Your API key or leave blank to use $WANDB_API_KEY

wandbProject.label: Project Name
wandbProject.name: wandb_project
wandbProject.help: Name of the wandb project to log experiments to. Will be created if it doesn't exist.

wandbRunName.label: Run Name (Optional)
wandbRunName.name: wandb_run_name
wandbRunName.help: Custom name for this training run. If empty, wandb will auto-generate a name.

wandbNotes.label: Notes (Optional)
wandbNotes.name: wandb_notes
wandbNotes.help: Description or notes about this training run.
